🧠 NEURAL VM CREATOR

One-click Virtual Machine Deployment

🔐 GitHub Configuration

Create token: Settings → Developer settings → Personal access tokens → Generate new token (Scopes: repo, workflow)

⚙️ VM Configuration

📖 How to Connect

1. After clicking Deploy, wait 2-3 minutes

2. Check GitHub Actions tab for credentials

3. Use Remote Desktop Connection (Windows)

4. Enter IP address and credentials

5. Session will auto-expire after selected duration
